name: Gimbels Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in water until tender.
2. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Peel and slice the cooled potatoes.
4. In a large bowl, combine the salad dressing with onions, celery, and pimentos. Mix well.
5. Add the sliced potatoes and chopped eggs to the bowl. Mix gently.
6. Chill the mixture until serving.
